texto: What have I become?My sweetest friend
autor: everyone I know goes away in the end.And you could have it all:my empire of dirt.I will let you down.I will make you hurt.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de everyone I know goes away in the end.And you could have it all:my empire of dirt.I will let you down.I will make you hurt. que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “What have I become?My sweetest friend”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, nine-inch-nails, become, com foco em termino e reflexao.
